articles.title: RobotX Challenge 2026
articles.summary: Program RobotX Challenge 2026 It's time to take maritime robotics and autonomy to the next level. Let us introduce you to the Maritime RobotX Challenge. In real-world port, harbor, and coastal operations, no single vehicle operates in isolation. Modern maritime autonomy depends on cross-domain coordination with vessels

articles.title: Canadian Drone Regulations and Testing Explained: Introduction to Canadian Drone Testing
articles.summary: Canada has become one of the leading countries in drone technology and innovation. From snowy mountain regions to crowded urban areas, the country provides a perfect environment for testing advanced drone systems. A Canadian drone test is more than just flying
